name: Passover Chocolate Sponge Cake
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated rind of 1 Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat egg yolks and sugar until light and fluffy for about 7 minutes.
3. Add cold water, orange juice, orange rind, chocolate, and matzo cake flour to the yolk mixture.
4. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Pour batter into a 10-inch tube pan with removable insert.
6. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes or until the cake springs back when gently pressed.
7. Allow cake to cool completely, inverted on a cake rack, before removing from the pan.
